CustomField.description: Determines where form submissions are stored. Primary Object writes to the form's primary SObject. Form Response stores answers in the Form_Response object (for surveys). Both writes to both targets.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Primary Object: writes to the SObject (e.g., creates an Account). Form Response: stores answers as Form_Response records (for surveys). Both: writes to both.
CustomField.label: Submission Storage
